name: Mesh Corner Cabinet Black - Threshold™: Sleek Metal Storage with Golden Handles, V-Shaped Design
description:
Add more storage space into your living room with this Mesh Corner Cabinet from Threshold™. Supported on sleek and small rectangular legs, this metal corner cabinet features a V-shaped silhouette that easily fits in your room's corner. Featuring a clean-lined silhouette with two metal mesh doors, it opens up to reveal a single shelf for storing a variety of household items. Designed in a black metal finish, it also has rectangular golden handles to bring a striking contrast to it.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 28.5 inches
Overall Height: 30.0 inches
Overall Depth: 15.4 inches
Distance between shelves: 11.5 inches, adjustable
Distance from front to back of shelves: 12.8 inches
Distance from floor to bottom of bottom shelf: 4.1 inches
Distance between side frames: 25.6 inches
Distance from front to back of top shelf sides: 20.2 inches
Depth of Shelf: 12.8 inches
